test_patch:
diff --git a/internal/storage/unmodifiable/store_test.go b/internal/storage/unmodifiable/store_test.go
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..c52dfdf1
--- /dev/null
+++ b/internal/storage/unmodifiable/store_test.go
@@ -0,0 +1,104 @@
+package unmodifiable
+
+import (
+	"errors"
+	"testing"
+
+	"github.com/stretchr/testify/require"
+	"go.flipt.io/flipt/internal/storage/fs"
+	"go.flipt.io/flipt/rpc/flipt"
+)
+
+func TestModificationMethods(t *testing.T) {
+	ctx := t.Context()
+	s := NewStore(fs.NewStore(nil))
+
+	// Representative mutating operations across entities and operation types.
+	_, err := s.CreateNamespace(ctx, &flipt.CreateNamespaceRequest{})
+	require.ErrorIs(t, err, errReadOnly)
+
+	// Also validate one blocker-dependent contract detail on the same error.
+	var roErr *readOnlyError
+	require.True(t, errors.As(err, &roErr))
+	require.Equal(t, "STORAGE_MUTATION_BLOCKED", roErr.Code())
+
+	err = s.DeleteFlag(ctx, &flipt.DeleteFlagRequest{})
+	require.ErrorIs(t, err, errReadOnly)
+
+	err = s.OrderRules(ctx, &flipt.OrderRulesRequest{})
+	require.ErrorIs(t, err, errReadOnly)
+
+	_, err = s.UpdateDistribution(ctx, &flipt.UpdateDistributionRequest{})
+	require.ErrorIs(t, err, errReadOnly)
+
+	err = s.OrderRollouts(ctx, &flipt.OrderRolloutsRequest{})
+	require.ErrorIs(t, err, errReadOnly)
+}
+
+func TestReadOnlyErrorCodeToken(t *testing.T) {
+	ctx := t.Context()
+	s := NewStore(fs.NewStore(nil))
+
+	_, err := s.CreateNamespace(ctx, &flipt.CreateNamespaceRequest{})
+
+	var roErr *readOnlyError
+	require.True(t, errors.As(err, &roErr))
+	require.Equal(t, "STORAGE_MUTATION_BLOCKED", roErr.Code())
+}
+
+func TestReadOnlyHTTPStatusCode(t *testing.T) {
+	ctx := t.Context()
+	s := NewStore(fs.NewStore(nil))
+
+	_, err := s.CreateFlag(ctx, &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{})
+
+	type statusCoder interface {
+		StatusCode() int
+	}
+	var sc statusCoder
+	require.True(t, errors.As(err, &sc))
+	require.Equal(t, 423, sc.StatusCode())
+}
+
+func TestStoreIdentifier(t *testing.T) {
+	s := NewStore(fs.NewStore(nil))
+	require.Equal(t, "fenced-store", s.String())
+}
+
+func TestReadOnlyPrecedenceOverValidation(t *testing.T) {
+	ctx := t.Context()
+	s := NewStore(fs.NewStore(nil))
+
+	_, err := s.CreateNamespace(ctx, &flipt.CreateNamespaceRequest{Key: ""})
+	require.False(t, errors.Is(err, fs.ErrNotImplemented))
+	require.ErrorIs(t, err, errReadOnly)
+
+	var roErr *readOnlyError
+	require.True(t, errors.As(err, &roErr))
+	require.Equal(t, "STORAGE_MUTATION_BLOCKED", roErr.Code())
+}
+
+func TestUniformSentinelAcrossOperations(t *testing.T) {
+	ctx := t.Context()
+	s := NewStore(fs.NewStore(nil))
+
+	_, errCreate := s.CreateFlag(ctx, &flipt.CreateFlagRequest{})
+	_, errUpdate := s.UpdateFlag(ctx, &flipt.UpdateFlagRequest{})
+	errDelete := s.DeleteFlag(ctx, &flipt.DeleteFlagRequest{})
+	errOrder := s.OrderRules(ctx, &flipt.OrderRulesRequest{})
+	_, errCreateRollout := s.CreateRollout(ctx, &flipt.CreateRolloutRequest{})
+
+	require.True(t, errCreate == errUpdate)
+	require.True(t, errCreate == errDelete)
+	require.True(t, errCreate == errOrder)
+	require.True(t, errCreate == errCreateRollout)
+
+	require.Equal(t, errCreate.Error(), errUpdate.Error())
+	require.Equal(t, errCreate.Error(), errDelete.Error())
+	require.Equal(t, errCreate.Error(), errOrder.Error())
+	require.Equal(t, errCreate.Error(), errCreateRollout.Error())
+
+	var roErr *readOnlyError
+	require.True(t, errors.As(errCreate, &roErr))
+	require.Equal(t, "STORAGE_MUTATION_BLOCKED", roErr.Code())
+}
